samples.xml_description: Implement a right shifter. Clock. Input signal to be right-shifted. Output signal representing the result of the right shift operation. None Register is right-shifted by 1 bit. q <= (q >> 1); Most significant bit of the register is assigned the value of the input signal. q[7] <= d; Initialize a register to 0. On each rising edge of the clock, right-shift the contents of the register by 1 bit and insert the new input bit at the most significant position.
